single.reason: dashboard shows one day's briefing, not a list; no single-vs-many item distinction

many.reason: not a collection view; the briefing is one day, vitals are a fixed small set

loading.reason: server-rendered (force-dynamic) page; no client loading skeleton in this build

error.reason: read-only local SSR read; no error surface in this dashboard build

single.reason: Day-grouped feed; the Sparse scenario is the minimal real state and the singular entry-count boundary is covered by the TimelineDay Single Entry component scenario.

many.reason: Chronological scroll with no pagination or truncation; Rich Week already exercises multi-day grouping and scrolling, so a higher-count overflow state adds no distinct visual treatment.

loading.reason: Server-rendered force-dynamic RSC; the page has no client-fetch loading skeleton.

error.reason: The feed has no error surface; a failed or empty DB read renders the day-one empty state, covered by Day One Empty.
